# Timeless

A small, home-operated resale shop focused on buying and reselling items. The business has a personal, independent feel typical of home-based retail ventures, likely emphasizing value, affordability, and a curated selection of secondhand or discounted goods.

Source: https://example.com

Why Shop Timeless


## Timeless Bargains,Thoughtfully Gathered


Every item in our collection is hand-selected with care — because the best finds deserve a second chapter. Discover pre-loved fashion, vintage collectibles, and unique antiques that tell a story worth keeping.

























Est. Collection No. 01

### Thoughtfully Curated Finds



Each piece passes through careful hands before it reaches yours. We look for quality, character, and charm — selecting only the items we'd proudly keep ourselves. No filler, no clutter. Just genuine finds worth your attention.

















Est. Collection No. 02

### Affordable One-of-a-Kind Value



Express yourself without breaking the bank. Our prices reflect a belief that great style and unique pieces shouldn't be a luxury. Every tag is set fairly — so you can shop with confidence and leave with something truly one-of-a-kind.

















Est. Collection No. 03

### Sustainable Second Life Shopping



Choosing resale is choosing intention. When you shop secondhand, you give beautiful things a second life — reducing waste and keeping quality out of landfills. Shopping Timeless means your finds carry a history worth honoring.























Curated Finds

## Timeless Treasures,Discovered & Curated


Every piece in our collection carries its own quiet story — vintage accessories, home décor finds, small antiques, and storied objects chosen with care. Browse a glimpse of what awaits, and discover your own timeless bargain.

Explore the Gallery









Accessories & Adornments







Home & Décor

Unique Antiques

## The Story Behind Your Favorite Resale Shop — Timeless

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Meet the passionate mind behind Timeless — a home-based resale shop built on love for unique antiques and timeless treasures that bring joy without the hefty price tag.

The Story Behind Your Favorite Resale Shop — Timeless













































Skip to main content

















- Products All Courses




- Home
- About
- Gallery
- Contact
0























Our Story




# Where Every ObjectFinds Its Next Chapter


Timeless began the way most meaningful things do — quietly, at home, surrounded by objects with stories to tell. What started as a love of hunting for hidden gems at estate sales, thrift shops, and neighbourhood finds slowly became something more: a small, personal resale shop run from my own home, curated with care and offered to people who appreciate value without pretence.


There is something deeply satisfying about giving a well-made object another life. A brass lamp that lit someone's reading nook for thirty years. A coat that still holds its shape perfectly. A piece of art that deserves a new wall to hang on. These are not cast-offs — they are timeless bargains waiting to be discovered by someone who sees what they truly are.


Running this shop from home means every item passes through my hands personally. Nothing goes out the door without being checked, cleaned, and considered. It is a slower, more intentional way of doing business — and I believe that shows in every piece.







### What We Believe In


- — Resale is a form of respect — for craftsmanship, for the planet, and for your wallet.

- — Every home deserves beautiful things, regardless of budget.

- — Personal service matters more than a storefront ever could.



Browse the Collection















Est. at Home
Curated & Personal























Our Story








## Collected With Intention,Offered With Care



"Every object carries a history worth preserving — we simply find it a new chapter."





Timeless began the way most meaningful things do — quietly, at home, with a genuine love for objects that have lived. What started as a habit of haunting estate sales, thrift stores, and weekend markets grew into something more deliberate: a small resale shop built around the belief that secondhand shouldn't mean second-best.


We collect with intention. That means slowing down, looking closely, and choosing pieces that still have something to say — a cast-iron skillet seasoned by decades of Sunday mornings, a wool coat with the kind of cut that never really goes out of style, a ceramic vase whose glaze catches light in a way no mass-produced piece ever could. These are Timeless treasures that carry warmth, character, and a quiet elegance earned through years of use.


Our shop is home-operated by design. There's no warehouse, no algorithm deciding what lands on the shelf. Every item passes through our hands personally — cleaned, assessed, and priced fairly so that quality finds can reach people who appreciate them. We believe in Timeless resale as a practice of care: for the objects themselves, for the people who find them, and for a way of living that values substance over novelty.


Whether you're furnishing a first apartment, hunting for a meaningful gift, or simply drawn to the idea of owning something with a story, you'll find it here. Come browse, take your time, and let something find you.












Curated with care — each piece chosen by hand



A home-run shop with a personal touch




















What We Stand For

## The Principles Behind Every Find


At Timeless, every item we bring into our home shop is chosen with care and purpose. We believe great things shouldn't cost a fortune — and that pre-loved treasures deserve a second life in a home that will truly appreciate them.













01




### Honest Affordability


We believe quality finds shouldn't require a big budget. Every item in our shop is priced fairly — so you can express yourself without breaking the bank and walk away feeling like you found something truly special.









02




### Sustainable Resale


Giving items a second life is one of the most thoughtful things we can do. Our resale model keeps quality goods out of landfills and in the hands of people who will genuinely use and love them — a win for wallets and the world alike.









03




### Curation Over Clutter


We don't stock everything — we stock the right things. Each piece in our Timeless resale collection is hand-selected for its condition, character, and lasting appeal. You'll find unique antiques and pre-loved fashion, not an overwhelming pile of castoffs.









04




### Personal Customer Care


As a home-operated shop, every transaction is personal. We know our inventory, we know our customers, and we take pride in making sure every purchase feels like a discovery. Expect real communication, honest descriptions, and genuine warmth in every interaction.























What Our Customers Say


## Timeless Treasures,Honest Finds






All Courses












"

I found an absolutely stunning vintage brooch that I've been searching for years. The selection is curated with such a careful eye — every piece feels like it has a story. This is my go-to for unique antiques and pre-loved fashion that you simply can't find anywhere else.









Margaret L.
4716 Simms st wheatridge co 80033, Wheat Ridge, CO, 80033, United States












"

Shopping at Timeless is like discovering a well-kept secret. The prices are genuinely fair — you can express yourself without breaking the bank — and the owner is warm, honest, and knowledgeable. I picked up three budget-friendly gifts for my family and every one of them was a hit.









Daniel R.
Verified Buyer












"

There is something truly special about a shop where the person behind it genuinely cares. I came looking for vintage collectibles and left with so much more — a beautiful piece of jewellery, a conversation I'll remember, and the feeling of having found something timeless. Highly recommend.









Sylvia M.
Verified Buyer

## Browse Pieces That Make You Fall Head Over Heels — Timeless

Our Collection

# Timeless Treasures,Thoughtfully Curated




Each piece in our collection tells a story — from vintage collectibles and pre-loved fashion to statement furniture and one-of-a-kind decor. Browse our curated selection of unique antiques and secondhand finds that let you express yourself without breaking the bank.

















Jewelry & Accessories














Home Decor













Furniture












Fashion Accents

















Atmospheric Scenes












Collectibles & Gifts
















Curated Themes


## Timeless Vignettes



Three chapters of Timeless Resale — each a carefully composed world of pre-loved objects waiting to find their next home.










01




### Collected Tabletop


Mismatched porcelain, heirloom silver, and hand-thrown ceramics gathered from estate sales and quiet collections. Each piece carries the memory of a well-set table — ready to begin a new chapter in your home.

Unique Antiques









02




### Keepsake Jewelry


Gold lockets, cameo brooches, pearl strands, and charm bracelets — each piece a small biography. Express yourself without breaking the bank with our rotating selection of pre-loved jewelry that feels personal and rare.

Pre-loved Fashion









03




### Storied Corners


Vintage lamps, framed botanicals, worn hardcovers, and one-of-a-kind accent pieces that transform forgotten nooks into rooms with character. Timeless treasures that will have you falling head over heels for your own space again.

Budget Friendly Gifts
























Why Shoppers Return

## The Timeless Difference





01

### Curated Variety


Every item in the shop has been personally selected — no mass-market sameness, no warehouse excess. Each piece earns its place, making every browse feel like a genuine discovery among Timeless treasures that will have you falling head over heels.




02

### Sustainable Shopping


Choosing pre-loved fashion and unique antiques means giving beautiful things a second life. Shopping resale is one of the most meaningful ways to express yourself without breaking the bank — and without adding to the cycle of disposable consumption.




03

### Affordable Discovery


Timeless bargains don't mean compromising on quality or character. From vintage collectibles to budget friendly gifts for any occasion, every find carries a story — offered at a price that makes the discovery all the sweeter.























Timeless Resale — Always Curating

## Something WonderfulMay Be Waiting


Every week brings new finds — pre-loved fashion, unique antiques, vintage collectibles, and budget-friendly gifts for any occasion. Reach out to ask about current availability, what's coming in soon, or the kinds of timeless treasures we typically source. This is a personal shop run with care, and every inquiry is welcome.


Get in Touch
Our Story

Get in Touch


# We'd Love toHear From You


Timeless is a small, home-operated resale shop — which means you're always talking directly with the owner. Whether you have a question about an item, want to arrange a local pickup, or simply want to know more about what we carry, we're here and happy to help.


















Shop Hours


Monday – Friday
10:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday
10:00 AM – 4:00 PM
Sunday
09:00 - 17:00, 7 ימים בשבוע

## Ask Us Anything


Questions about Timeless resale finds, local pickup, or something you spotted in our shop — we're just a message away.

Send Message














Questions & Answers

## What You'd Like to Know


A few common questions about Timeless — the small, home-run resale shop curated with care. If you don't find your answer here, reach out directly.








### What kinds of items do you typically carry?


Timeless focuses on pre-loved fashion, vintage collectibles, unique antiques, and budget-friendly gifts for any occasion. The selection shifts regularly — think jewelry, housewares, clothing, and small décor pieces that feel like they belong in a well-loved home.









### How often does new inventory arrive?


New finds are added on a rolling basis — there's no fixed schedule, because resale works on discovery. Following along on social media is the best way to catch fresh arrivals before they're gone. Good pieces move quickly.









### How does local pickup work?


Timeless is a home-based operation, so all pickups are arranged 09:00 - 17:00, 7 ימים בשבוע. Once you've confirmed your interest in an item, we'll coordinate a convenient time and share the pickup address. No walk-ins — just a relaxed, personal handoff.









### How do I ask about a specific item or make an inquiry?


The easiest way is to send a message through the contact form on this page or reach out via the social links below. Include a description or photo reference if you have something specific in mind — Timeless bargains are often found through conversation.









### Do you buy items, or only sell?


Both. If you have pieces you'd like to part with — clothing, collectibles, small antiques — get in touch with details and photos. Timeless is always on the lookout for quality additions to the shop, and the right find is always welcome.


























Find Us

## Where to Find Timeless


Timeless operates from home — a personal, curated resale shop rooted in the local community. No storefronts, no middlemen. Just direct, friendly communication for pickup coordination and browsing arrangements.












### Locally Based, Personally Run


Timeless is a home-based resale shop serving the surrounding local area. Browse our curated selection of pre-loved fashion, vintage collectibles, and timeless treasures — then reach out directly to arrange a convenient pickup.



4716 Simms st wheatridge co 80033, Wheat Ridge, CO, 80033, United States













Service Area

### Local Community


We serve our immediate local area with home-based pickup. Address details are shared directly upon inquiry — keeping things personal and convenient.









Contact Preference

### Message First


The best way to reach Timeless is via email or message. We'll confirm availability, share pickup details, and arrange a time that works for you.









Response Timing

### Within 24 Hours


We typically respond to all inquiries within one business day. Weekend messages are welcome — we'll get back to you by the next morning.





























Stay Connected


## Every Piece Has a Story.Let's Find Yours.


Timeless is a small, home-run shop with a big heart for pieces that carry character and history. Whether you're hunting for a hidden gem, a budget-friendly gift, or something that simply speaks to you — reach out directly and let's talk. New finds arrive often, and the best timeless treasures never last long.

Get in Touch

## Return Policy

URL: https://example.com/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Timeless





















































What Our Customers Say


## Timeless Treasures,Real Impressions






All Courses










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 5/28/2026



At Timeless, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: timelesscontact4u@gmail.com


Phone: (720) 739-1852


Address: 4716 Simms st wheatridge co 80033, Wheat Ridge, United States

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy


















What Our Customers Say


## Timeless Treasures,Real Impressions








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  5/28/2026



Timeless ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Timeless

- Email: timelesscontact4u@gmail.com

- Phone: (720) 739-1852

- Address: 4716 Simms st wheatridge co 80033, Wheat Ridge, United States



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement


















What Our Customers Say


## Timeless Treasures,Real Impressions








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  May 28, 2026



Timeless is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Timeless

- Email: timelesscontact4u@gmail.com

- Phone: (720) 739-1852



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions


















What Our Customers Say


## Timeless Treasures,Real Impressions








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  May 28, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Timeless

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Retail / Resale provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Timeless provides Retail / Resale through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Timeless. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Timeless

- Email: timelesscontact4u@gmail.com

- Phone: (720) 739-1852

- Address: 4716 Simms st wheatridge co 80033, Wheat Ridge, United States
